heading: Publicly operated community health centers
label: 2012a Publicly operated community health centers
text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, the provisions of subsections (f) and (i) of and , concerning private, nonprofit drug addiction or alcohol treatment and rehabilitation programs, shall henceforth also be applicable to publicly operated community health centers.1section 2012 of this titlesection 2019 of this titleSee References in Text note below.1
notes: References in TextSubsections (f) and (i) of , referred to in text, were redesignated subsecs. (h) and (n), respectively, by , , . Subsec. CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Supplemental Appropriations Act, 1985, and not as part of the Food and Nutrition Act of 2008 which comprises this chapter.
